reference: I recently had X-rays of my lower back and have been told I have arthritis. Besides a back operation, there is not much else that can be done except for pain medication. I do not know what type it is, but it causes pain in my lower back and, at times, pins and needles in my legs. At times, I cannot feel my legs. Do you have suggestions?
text: I recently had X-rays of my lower back and have been told I have arthritis. Besides a back operation, there is not much else that can be done except for pain medication. I do not know what type it is, but it causes pain in my lower back and, at times, pins and needles in my legs. At times, I cannot feel my legs. Do you have suggestions?
